zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stratton Andrews於1444年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝利哈姆時，她的父親John Andrews II34歲，母親Elizabeth de Stratton34歲。她於1466年2月1日與Thomas de Windsor在英國素福爾可貝利哈姆結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1485年在英國英格蘭米德萊可霍利 特利尼迪 米諾列斯享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可豪斯洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stratton Andrews于1444年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可貝利哈姆时，她的父亲John Andrews II34岁，母亲Elizabeth de Stratton34岁。她于1466年2月1日与Thomas de Windsor在英国素福爾可貝利哈姆结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1485年在英国英格兰米德萊可霍利 特利尼迪 米諾列斯享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可豪斯洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stratton Andrews was born in 1444, in Baylham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Andrews II, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth de Stratton, was 34. She married Thomas de Windsor on 1 February 1466, in Baylham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died about 1485, in Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Hounslow, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stratton Andrews est née en 1444, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Andrews II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Stratton, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Windsor le 1 février 1466, à Baylham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1485, à Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Hounslow, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stratton Andrews 1444 in Baylham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Andrews II 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Stratton 34. Sie hat am 1. Februar 1466 in Baylham, Suffolk, England Thomas de Windsor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 1485 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hounslow, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stratton Andrews è nata il nel 1444 nel Baylham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Andrews II, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Stratton, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Windsor il 1 febbraio 1466, nel Baylham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 1485, nel Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Hounslow, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stratton Andrewsが1444年にイギリスイギリススフォルクバイルハムで生まれた時，父John Andrews IIは34歳，母Elizabeth de Strattonは34歳であった。1466年2月1日にイギリススフォルクバイルハムでThomas de Windsorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1485年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスホーリー トリニトイ ミノーイスで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスホーウンスロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Bur Stoke, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치
ko.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 홀이 트리니티 민리스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stratton Andrews(이)가 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Andrews II(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Stratton(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1466년 2월 1일 영국 수폴크 베이함에서 Thomas de Windsor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 홀이 트리니티 민리스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 허슬로에 묻혔다.

pt.Bur Stoke, Suffolk, England: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stratton Andrews nasceu em 1444, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Andrews II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Stratton, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Windsor em 1 de fevereiro de 1466, em Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1485, em Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Hounslow, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bur Stoke, Suffolk, England: сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: холи тринити минориесь, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stratton Andrews родилась в 1444 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Andrews II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Stratton, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Windsor 1 февраля 1466 г. в местности беилхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла около 1485 г. в местности холи тринити минориесь, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности хоунслоу, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Englan: Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stratton Andrews nació en 1444, en Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Andrews II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Stratton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Thomas de Windsor el 1 de febrero de 1466, en Baylham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1485, en Holy Trinity Minories, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Hounslow, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
